name: swanns-way-sync
description: Cross-medium reading map for Proust's Swann's Way: landmark guideposts linking the Lydia Davis (Penguin) and Moncrieff (Modern Library) editions to the audiobook. Reading aid only — no book text or audio is reproduced.

scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => fs.rmSync('_site', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
